revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-115

InterScan

A technique for presenting additional information, in the form of alpha-numerics, markers, cursors, etc., on a radar display, by using the intervals between the normal radar presentation scans.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Inter-trace display}}
